nasa_apod.title: Mystic Mountain Monster being Destroyed
nasa_apod.explanation: Inside the head of this interstellar monster is a star that is slowly destroying it.  The huge monster, actually an inanimate series of pillars of gas and dust, measures light years in length.  The in-head star is not itself visible through the opaque interstellar dust but is bursting out partly by ...
